creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Niclas, how do we proceed from here?  There has been a long silence from x11@.
Per comment #11, Jan no longer has the problem from comment #7, so I do not
think anything is really blocking this?  (In any case the SHM_ANON patch is
trivially revertable too if anyone runs into problems with it.)

Should we ask for an exp-run and then ship it?
